messages.content: how do I reset my password

It seems I don't have the specific password reset article in my knowledge base at the moment. However, I can provide a general overview of the password reset process:

1. Go to the login page of the website or application.
2. Click on the "Forgot Password" or "Reset Password" link.
3. Enter the email address associated with your account.
4. Follow the instructions sent to your email to reset your password, which may involve clicking a link or entering a code.
5. Once you've reset your password, be sure to update it in any saved login information or password managers.

If you have any trouble with the password reset process, please reach out to our support team directly and we'll be happy to assist you further. Let me know if you have any other questions!
